attacking_style: Reactive counter-puncher who excels at following explosive attacks rather than initiating. Strongest in final 4km when responding to multiple accelerations on punchy terrain.
team_tactics: Jumbo-Visma's support appears inconsistent, with tactical plans sometimes lacking coherence. Benoot often operates individually rather than being set up by domestiques.
terrain_preference: Punchy, repeated short climbs in final kilometers (Flemish-style finales). Struggles on sustained climbs where late bridging attempts are required. Explosive terrain suits better than grinding efforts.
vulnerability: Lacks finishing speed in small group sprints after following attacks. Bridging efforts on longer climbs fail. Appears tactically isolated when team plan is unclear.
key_patterns: Exceptional ability to follow explosive late-race attacks, only rider matching Van der Poel's accelerations (2 instances)
Struggles to convert strong positioning into wins, unable to outsprint those he follows
Inconsistent team tactical support from Jumbo-Visma across different race types
form_trajectory: neutral: showed elite following ability at Dwars door Vlaanderen but failed bridging attempt 10 days later at Amstel suggests inconsistent form
